description: List fields for a folder and enrich them with stable IDs, option metadata, reference counts, and provenance when available.

folder_id.title: Folder Id

refresh.description: Refresh cached discovery metadata instead of reusing the last cached response.
refresh.title: Refresh

name: list_folder_fields
